Meta.Topic: MANTU solve - Programming Interview Question Bill of Materials (BOM) Calculation
Tags: mantu_solve___programming_interview_question_bill_of_materials__bom__calculation

Cards.Back: Endpoint | Description
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation
mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products` | Retrieves a list of all products. Supports filtering by name (`?name=...`).
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products` | Creates a new product. Body: `{ "id": "X", "name": "Product X", "description": "..." }`.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products/{productId}` | Retrieves the details of a single product.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products/{productId}` | Updates the details (name, description) of a product.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products/{productId}` | Deletes a product. This should also remove any BOM entries where it is a parent.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation
mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products/{productId}/components` | Retrieves the list of direct components for a product.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products/{productId}/components` | Adds a component to a product's BOM. Body: `{ "componentId": "Y", "quantity": 5 }`.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products/{productId}/components/{componentId}` | Updates the quantity of a specific component in a product's BOM. Body: `{ "quantity": 10 }`.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/products/{productId}/components/{componentId}` | Removes a component from a product's BOM.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation
mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `/analysis/material-requirements/{productId}?quantity={qty}` | **Calculates the final list of raw materials**. `quantity` is an optional query parameter (defaults to 1).
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `VARCHAR(50)` | `PRIMARY KEY`, `NOT NULL` | The unique identifier for the product (e.g., "A", "B", "CPU-i9").

Cards.Back: `VARCHAR(255)` | `NOT NULL` | The human-readable name of the product.

Cards.Back: `TEXT` | `NULL` | A longer description of the product.

Cards.Back: `DATETIME` | `NOT NULL`, `DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP` | Timestamp of when the record was created.

Cards.Back: `DATETIME` | `NOT NULL`, `DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP` | Timestamp of the last update.

Cards.Back: Data Type | Constraints | Description
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `VARCHAR(50)` | `PRIMARY KEY`, `FOREIGN KEY (Products.ProductId)` | The ID of the product being assembled. Part of a composite key.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `VARCHAR(50)` | `PRIMARY KEY`, `FOREIGN KEY (Products.ProductId)` | The ID of the component required. Part of a composite key.
Tags: mantu solve - programming interview question bill of materials (bom) calculation

Cards.Back: `INT` | `NOT NULL`, `CHECK (Quantity > 0)` | The number of units of the component required for one unit of the parent.
